Home.heroImageAlt: Fresh seafood and fish on ice at a market stall.
Home.heroTitle: Fish and seafood — freshness kept in check from dock to kitchen
Home.heroSubtitle: ProService Fish curates stock and coordinates orders for households, restaurants, and food businesses. Live availability, pricing on request, and WhatsApp for a direct line.
Home.feature1Desc: Receiving and storage with temperature-first handling to protect taste and texture.
Home.feature2Desc: Lot tracking and visible stock levels so you can plan purchases with confidence.
Home.feature3Desc: Flexible volumes and timing — tell us what you need and we align on fulfilment.
Home.catalogSubtitle: Open product pages and message us on WhatsApp with your request.
Home.emptyCatalog: Catalogue is loading. Try again later or message us on WhatsApp.
